caption: A man with long dark hair and glasses is performing in front of a backdrop of horizontal wooden slats. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt with blue embroidery on the chest, a dark vest, and a red beaded necklace. He is positioned behind a microphone and is playing an acoustic guitar. In the foreground, the back of several people's heads are visible, suggesting an audience. To the right of the man, a black stand displays the text "ORCA" in white capital letters. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in a similar position, focused on playing his instrument, while his facial expression and the position of his hands on the guitar shift slightly. The lighting and composition remain consistent throughout the scene.
